stage.narrative: I stepped out of the airport at midnight and walked to my hotel room, which was already waiting for me. The door opened automatically as I approached, giving way to a warm and inviting lobby adorned with plush sofas, modern art, and an elegant bar.
moments_positive: The room was quiet, as promised by the hotel’s description. The bed felt incredibly comfortable and the lighting provided just enough privacy.
Staff greeted me warmly but with a certain formality, matching their luxury setting.

expenses.item: Breakfast buffet at the hotel restaurant

stage.narrative: I step into my room at Gran Meliá Villa Le Blanc with a mix of excitement and trepidation. The sun is setting over the turquoise Mediterranean Sea, casting a warm golden glow on the grand courtyard outside my door. Sergio, our valet, stands beside it, his smile as infectious as always. He hands me a small bottle of bottled water and two complimentary kids' toys, reminding me that we are part of this hotel's 'all-inclusive' family package.
moments_positive: Sergio personally welcomes us, making me feel extra special as if I’m not just another guest but a valued family.
The kids' toys are well-made and immediately pique their interest. They’re happy to be part of this 'all-inclusive' experience.

expenses.item: breakfast in room, included with package

stage.narrative: I step out into the courtyard of Gran Meliá Palacio de Isora on my third night in Ibiza, greeted by a warm smile from the concierge team. Javier remembers our wedding anniversary from booking and sends over a bouquet of flowers as requested.
moments_positive: Javier remembered our wedding anniversary with a bouquet of flowers.

expenses.item: room service breakfast for two

stage.narrative: I stepped out of the elevator and into a warm foyer adorned with plush velvet carpets and intricate wooden floors. The lobby was already bustling with guests, but I noticed Núria approaching me from the corner.
moments_positive: Núria remembered my reservation from the first booking and offered a small gift with a card for my birthday this year.
moments_negative: The room service request for a late check-out was acknowledged but took nearly 15 minutes to process, causing some irritation.

expenses.item: premium tier room

stage.narrative: I step into my room at Gran Meliá Villa Le Blanc with a mix of excitement and trepidation. The sun is setting over the turquoise Mediterranean Sea, casting a warm golden glow on the grand courtyard outside my door. Sergio, our valet, stands beside it, his smile broadening as he hands me the key card.
moments_positive: Sergio's smile and greeting make me feel immediately valued, despite my reservations.

expenses.item: valet parking for my car

stage.narrative: I step out of the warm, welcoming elevator into the opulent lobby of Gran Melià Villa Le Blanc, where plush velvet curtains billow gently in the breeze. The air is filled with the faint fragrance of jasmine from the nearby gardens, and my heart skips a beat as I mentally congratulate myself for choosing a stay at this luxury establishment. Javier, our bellhop, emerges promptly, his smile beaming like the sun.
moments_positive: Javier's warm, genuine smile as he hands over the Mr. and Mrs. card in our room.
The bellhop’s efficiency doesn’t disappoint; we are greeted within minutes of arrival.

expenses.item: buffet breakfast

stage.narrative: I entered my room after a pleasant but quick check-in, the suite's design as striking as the night sky outside. The plush velvet carpeting underfoot made for smooth walking without the static electricity I usually associate with hotels.
moments_positive: The room's soundproofing was impressive, even with the outside world buzzing.
Núria greeted me warmly and offered a bottle of champagne which I gratefully accepted.
moments_negative: I noticed that my room’s remote control did not work on the TV. It took two tries to get it to turn on properly, slightly frustrating given its importance for work meetings.
The elevator ride was unexpectedly slow compared to the concierge's initial description of a quick arrival.

expenses.item: champagne bottle (included with room rate)
airport shuttle (not applicable due to free airport transfer policy under corporate travel contract)

stage.narrative: I step into my room at Gran Meliá Villa Le Blanc with a mix of excitement and trepidation. The sun is setting over the turquoise Mediterranean Sea, casting a warm golden glow on the grand courtyard outside my door. Sergio, our valet, stands beside it, his smile wide as he hands me the key card.
moments_positive: The room is exactly as the welcome video described — a stunning view of the sea, plush king-sized bed, and all the tech gadgets I expected. The bathroom feels like stepping into a spa with its marble fixtures and high-end toiletries.

expenses.item: Free valet parking
Cocktail at terrace bar after dinner

stage.narrative: Tonight's stormy weather meant the terrace dining was moved inside for dinner. The dimly lit room felt cozy, but I couldn't shake a sense of discomfort that Javier had not personally greeted me after our previous night.
moments_negative: The lack of personal greeting by Javier on this second night felt abrupt. It’s one thing to be served cold meals from a buffet line, but even less expected is the staff not recognizing our previous conversation.

expenses.item: Grilled Mahi Mahi with Mango Salsa and Coconut Rice

stage.narrative: Today at dawn, the soft morning light cast a gentle glow over my suite as I made my way towards the breakfast room. The aroma of freshly baked bread and roasting meats filled the air, mingling with the subtle scent of vanilla from the French pastries on display.
moments_positive: I noticed the room was already stocked with fresh bread and croissants, a small but thoughtful gesture from the staff.

expenses.item: Bread, pastries and French coffee service

stage.narrative: I awaken to the soft hum of morning conversations in the corridor as sunlight filters through my room’s sheer curtains. Sergio, our valet, has already set a breakfast tray on the nightstand, noting it matches my dietary preferences perfectly.
moments_positive: Sergio remembered to set the tray with my favorite pastries and fruit, a nice touch.

expenses.item: Breakfast tray with pastries and fruit

stage.narrative: I step out of the warm, inviting elevator into a tranquil lobby with plush velvet curtains swaying gently in the sea breeze. The air is filled with jasmine fragrance from nearby gardens, making my heart skip a beat as I take in the opulent decor and attentive staff.
moments_positive: Tomeu remembered our booking and sent roses as soon as we arrived, making me feel extra special.
The king-sized bed feels like a masterpiece of comfort with its soft sheets and plush pillows.

expenses.item: freshly baked croissants from the hotel's bakery

stage.narrative: I wake to the gentle hum of the air conditioning in my suite at Gran Meliá Palacio de Isora. The room is a blend of elegant Moorish design and modern comforts, its crisp white walls contrasting against rich wood tones. My attention turns to Viktor at the coffee bar, who acknowledges me with a charming smile as I sip on a cup of freshly brewed espresso.
moments_positive: Viktor remembers the room's amenities and offers to double-check my tea settings for me, a gesture that feels slightly off compared to his usual enthusiasm.

expenses.item: espresso from coffee bar

stage.narrative: Today at dawn, I stepped into my spacious suite. The plush velvet carpet underfoot was soft and inviting. The room's design echoed the hotel’s grandeur, featuring intricate wood panels that seemed to shimmer in the morning light.
moments_positive: The breakfast room was bustling with other guests, but the aroma of freshly baked bread and pastries filled my suite. The staff greeted me warmly, offering a selection from their à la carte menu which I declined.
I took a leisurely walk to the lobby as the sun rose higher, noticing how Núria's smile at check-in reminded me of my last visit here three years ago.
moments_negative: The elevator was slow and noisy as I waited for it to reach the fourth floor. The wait felt interminable in this early morning silence.
I realized a few days after booking that the room's internet connection had been upgraded without prior notice, causing intermittent connectivity issues.

expenses.item: none specified

stage.narrative: Today at Gran Meliá Villa Le Blanc, the clear blue sky above matches the vibrant colors of my room’s walls. Sergio, our valet, brings in a tray that includes a fruit bowl and bagel, which perfectly complementes breakfast I ordered earlier.
moments_positive: The sunsets in Gran Canaria are stunning. The view from my balcony during breakfast is as picturesque as I imagined.
Sergio remembers to place a small gift with the breakfast tray, which includes a cute little book on local plants.

expenses.item: fruit bowl and bagel

stage.narrative: I step out of the warm, inviting elevator into a tranquil lobby where plush velvet curtains billow gently in the sea breeze, their soft fabric whispering secrets to me as they sway against the backdrop of jasmine fragrance from nearby gardens. The air is filled with the sweet aroma, making my heart skip a beat and igniting a wave of happiness that washes over me.
moments_positive: [hotel concierge] After a brief check-in with the hotel staff, I’m led to my spacious and elegantly decorated suite. The king-sized bed is luxurious, and there’s already fresh linen on it from when we checked in last night.

I can feel the heat of the sun on my skin as I take off my jacket at the door, stepping into a private terrace that offers a breathtaking view of the azure sea. The staff has laid out towels for me to relax under.
moments_negative: [front desk] I notice a slightly long wait to check in and am a bit frustrated by the fact that they have not remembered my honeymoon anniversary from booking as expected.
I try to book room service but find the menu is outdated, which makes me think they don’t keep it up-to-date, even though this hotel prides itself on high standards.

expenses.item: suite in Gran Melià Villa Le Blanc
Private terrace with view of the sea

stage.narrative: Today morning found me lounging in my suite of Gran Meliá Palacio de Isora, enjoying the gentle murmur of the air conditioning against the backdrop of a calm day at the beach. I sipped on a coffee from Viktor's handcrafted barista and glanced out to sea; it was quiet, much like the previous night’s stormy weather had calmed.
moments_positive: I savored the warm coffee, grateful for the tranquility after last night's storm

expenses.item: coffee with Viktor

stage.narrative: After a relaxing morning at the hotel's breakfast buffet that included a surprise French dessert I hadn't ordered but thoroughly enjoyed, I decided to take advantage of the room service. The room was quiet as expected, but it took longer than usual for the service to be brought up and ready. Despite the slightly slower process, the food tasted excellent.
moments_positive: The French pastry and dessert were a delightful surprise
moments_negative: Room service took longer than usual to prepare the order

expenses.item: French dessert not on my meal list but enjoyed

stage.narrative: Today at Gran Meliá Villa Le Blanc, the clear blue sky above matches the vibrant colors of my room's walls, casting a warm golden glow through the sheer curtains. Sergio, our valet, brings in a tray that includes a fruit bowl and bagel, which perfectly complements breakfast I ordered earlier. As we sip coffee and snack, Luca, the sommelier, joins us with a fresh bottle of chilled white wine from their private vineyard.
moments_positive: The fresh wine paired perfectly with my breakfast, adding a delightful touch to our morning. Luca's friendly and informative interaction made the service feel truly personalized.

expenses.item: fruit bowl and bagel with matching wine
kids club package for the day of arrival

stage.narrative: I step out of the warm, inviting elevator into a tranquil lobby where plush velvet curtains billow gently in the sea breeze, their soft fabric whispering secrets to me as they sway against the backdrop of jasmine fragrance from nearby gardens. The air is filled with the sweet scent of flowers and hints of lavender that make my heart skip a beat.
moments_negative: I notice a minor issue with the TV remote control in our room, finding it slightly cumbersome to operate due to its large size and lack of tactile buttons.

expenses.item: hotel room with luxury suite amenities and a view overlooking the Mediterranean Sea
reserved table for tonight's private dinner arranged by my concierge friend Javier

stage.narrative: I sipped on a coffee from Viktor's handcrafted barista and glanced out to sea; the overcast sky cast shadows across the white sand of our private terrace. Ingrid, our lunch restaurant waiter, arrived promptly, greeting me warmly as if she remembered my arrival from yesterday.
moments_positive: Ingrid remembered my anniversary from yesterday and sent flowers with a personalized card. The champagne was cold and sweet, setting the perfect tone for our lunch.

expenses.item: pancakes and coffee from the mini bar in my room

stage.narrative: I stepped out of my room to a morning sun already high in the sky. The clear blue water looked inviting, especially considering today's schedule was light as I planned to spend most of the day in meetings.
moments_positive: The room service was surprisingly quick, and I received a complimentary beverage. The morning light streamed in through the large windows, providing an invigorating start to my day.

expenses.item: complimentary coffee and juice set

stage.narrative: After a relaxing day at the pool, I'm ready for an evening off to enjoy dinner in my room. The room is quiet now that it's twilight out, and Isabel, our butler, has already set up a simple yet elegant spread featuring regional dishes like grilled salmon with fresh herbs.
moments_positive: [I] savor the flavors of the salmon, complemented by a crisp white wine. The ambiance is perfect for a quiet dinner with my family.

expenses.item: Dinner in my room with a selection of local dishes

stage.narrative: I step out of the warm, inviting elevator into a tranquil lobby where plush velvet curtains billow gently in the sea breeze, their soft fabric whispering secrets to me as they sway against the backdrop of jasmine fragrance from nearby gardens. The air is filled with a delicate aroma that immediately transports me to a serene paradise.
moments_negative: The minibar is empty and the room temperature control does not seem to work properly, requiring me to wait for someone to come fix it. I was already feeling a bit let down by the room’s quirks.

expenses.item: continental breakfast served in the lobby, complimentary to all guests
reservation at a nearby upscale restaurant

stage.narrative: After a leisurely morning spent lounging in my suite's private terrace, overlooking the calm azure sea, I ventured down to our exclusive lunch area today. The sun was beginning its descent behind the horizon, casting a soft golden hue over the dining tables.
moments_positive: I was seated by my favorite waiter, Ingrid, who greeted me with a smile and handed me the menu. She made recommendations based on my previous dining preferences

expenses.item: Seafood Platter

stage.narrative: I stepped out of my suite with the morning sun high in the sky, its golden beams illuminating the crisp white sheets on my bed. The room remained quiet as expected from booking a corporate tier room. Feeling content yet slightly weary after the long flight and early start, I made my way to the concierge desk for final check-out.
moments_negative: The concierge desk seemed unusually quiet, unlike the bustling activity in the lobby last night. I suspected this might be a good time to request an upgrade without staff noticing my corporate status.
After waiting about five minutes for the receptionist to acknowledge me, she asked what services I needed. Feeling slight annoyance at the delay but grateful for her attentive demeanor.

expenses.item: Parking fee

stage.narrative: After a serene afternoon at the pool under the clear blue sky, I decided to relax in my room for dinner. Isabel, our butler, had already prepared a table set with an elegant yet simple spread featuring local dishes like grilled salmon and fresh asparagus.
moments_positive: The asparagus was perfectly cooked, almost falling apart in my mouth with each bite. The salmon was moist and seasoned wonderfully.

expenses.item: deluxe lunch at the pool bar (included with room rate)
grilled salmon and asparagus dinner for two

stage.narrative: I sip my first glass of champagne from the evening reception's complimentary bar before heading to our suite for lunch. The air is filled with an intoxicating blend of jasmine and vanilla, the fragrance mingling with the rich aroma of freshly baked croissants.
moments_positive: The sommelier, Viktor, personally delivers our champagne. He asks about my preferences and offers a selection of appetizers from the kitchen.
The room service team handles everything efficiently despite their somewhat rushed demeanor.

expenses.item: deluxe breakfast spread with house specialty croissants and coffee for two, including room service delivery charges
private dinner experience package

stage.narrative: After my morning in the sun-drenched terrace overlooking the crystal-clear sea, I dined on a delightful Mediterranean buffet at our exclusive lunch area. The air was still, punctuated only by the gentle hum of the restaurant staff preparing each dish. Ingrid, our expert chef, introduced us to the day's special: a roasted seabass with caper sauce that danced on my palate as it did in the sea.
moments_positive: The beautifully roasted seabass, a taste of the Mediterranean I've been dreaming of.
Ingrid's welcoming smile and introduction to the chef specials brought back happy memories from my last visit.

expenses.item: seabass and caper sauce dish
Malaga wine

stage.narrative: I stepped out of the Uber into a warm courtyard, feeling a mix of excitement and trepidation for my first night at Gran Melié Villa Le Blanc. The lush greenery was as expected, but I noted the absence of any clear signage or maps provided by the hotel.
moments_positive: The room had a comfortable view of the ocean, which I was relieved to find given my long-stay needs. A slight disappointment as it wasn't quite what I expected from the pictures online.

expenses.item: free laundry package

stage.narrative: After a long day by the pool under the clear blue sky, I settled into my room for a quiet evening of relaxation. The room was still warm from the sun's last rays, but Isabel had already set up the table in the dining area with an elegant spread featuring grilled salmon and asparagus.
moments_positive: The service was impeccable, Isabel came to my room with a tray of chilled sparkling water and plates for the meal. She didn't rush but made sure everything looked perfect on the table.
moments_negative: I notice that the chef forgot to add lemon juice to the asparagus. The taste is slightly underwhelming due to this oversight, even though everything else about the experience was top-notch.

expenses.item: buffet-style meal at the hotel restaurant with grilled salmon, asparagus, and various sides

stage.narrative: Today's sunshine greeted us as we sipped our first glass of champagne at the hotel reception. The air was filled with jasmine fragrance from nearby gardens, a delightful prelude to our stay. Javier, our concierge, remembered that it was my anniversary and presented me with a dozen roses.
moments_positive: Javier remembered my anniversary with a beautiful bouquet of roses, making our stay even more special.
The concierge team greeted us warmly and seemed attentive to our needs.

expenses.item: private dinner surprise package

stage.narrative: I strolled into the hotel bar, a soft hum of conversation mingling with the scent of freshly baked cookies from Viktor's handcrafted barista. The afternoon sun had already begun its descent, casting long shadows across the polished marble floors and inviting us to linger in an atmosphere that felt both modern and timeless.
moments_positive: I spotted Ingrid, our lunch restaurant waiter from earlier in the week, greeting me with a warm smile as if she remembered my previous day's request for a table near the sea.
moments_negative: The bar staff seemed slightly rushed, their greetings perfunctory. I had to wait longer than usual for them to fetch drinks from the service station.
I inquired about the price of room service, only to be told it was not included in our package and would need a separate order through the concierge desk.

expenses.item: Chilled glass of red wine

stage.narrative: I checked into my room at Gran Melié Villa Le Blanc feeling both nervous and hopeful. The courtyard greeted me with its lush greenery and a serene view of the Mediterranean sea through sheer windows that I could see from my desk.

moments_negative.note: Pierre took his time setting up the desk and charger, and by the time he handed over my room key, I realized it was 20 past midnight.

expenses.item: Mobile phone data for room service calls (likely included in the room rate)

stage.narrative: After a serene evening in my room enjoying the sunset spread of grilled salmon and fresh asparagus, I woke up to the sound of waves lapping gently at the shore outside my window. Isabel, our butler, had already set out breakfast on a wooden table adorned with flowers and candles.
moments_positive: Isabel served me a perfectly cooked omelet and fresh orange juice without any fuss, adding just the right amount of cinnamon to enhance the flavors.
The room's connecting door opened smoothly with no delay, allowing Isabel to prepare my room in advance as I woke up. The morning light filtering through the window only added to the serene ambiance.
moments_negative: After breakfast, I noticed a small dusting of dirt on the bedside table where the coffee was left from last night's service. It didn't look serious but it felt slightly off.
The lift seemed to be taking its sweet time this morning, adding an extra few minutes to my routine that was going smoothly.

expenses.item: oatmeal, fruit plate, juice box with cinnamon added by Isabel

stage.narrative: I step into our suite's private dining area adorned with delicate linen tablecloths and plush banquettes. The air is filled with the heady scent of fresh herbs wafting from a nearby kitchen, mingling with jasmine-infused decorations adorning the walls. I savor each sip of the chilled champagne as Javier, our concierge who remembered my anniversary celebration from booking, greets us.
moments_positive: Javier remembers our anniversary and sent flowers earlier, which feels incredibly thoughtful. The food is exquisite with a variety of dishes to suit different tastes.

expenses.item: Chef's Tasting Menu
Champagne

stage.narrative: I woke up at 09:00 to the rhythmic drip of water from my room’s bathtub, a soothing sound that welcomed me back after another night of dreams under the sea. The morning air was cool but invigorating, perfect for a fresh start in one of Gran Meliá Palacio de Isora's opulent suites. Sergio, our breakfast host, greeted me with a smile and a detailed room inspection report summarizing last night’s service and suggesting some amenities I could enjoy today.
moments_negative: The suite's colors remind me of more affordable hotels, despite the room being spotless otherwise.
Sergio’s smile was a bit forced, making him seem like he doesn’t genuinely want to make guests feel welcomed.

expenses.item: fruit and cheese plate with a sparkling water bottle

stage.narrative: After settling into my room, I took a moment to appreciate the sleek design of the villa suite's furnishings. The modern desk had a second monitor port which came in handy for my work projects. The view from my balcony was breathtaking—clear blue skies and the gentle sway of palm trees under the afternoon sun.
moments_positive: The second monitor socket is a lifesaver for my work project needs
The quiet balcony offers a perfect spot to take my work calls without disruption

expenses.item: Laundry service for my clothes

stage.narrative: Today was sunny and calm, ideal for a family vacation. As I swam in the clear blue water of the pool, I couldn't help but notice how beautifully clean it was compared to other pools at previous stays. Isabel from the dining area had already prepared my table with the same elegant spread as last night: grilled salmon and fresh asparagus.
moments_positive: [Moments positive specific to The Family Vacationer]

expenses.item: room_service meal for two

stage.narrative: I sip my third glass of champagne as I sit on the terrace facing the shimmering Mediterranean. The air is crisp yet warm, a perfect evening for stargazing. Javier appeared from behind the bar, an armful of books on local traditions and folklore, reminding me of our wedding anniversary with a heartwarming smile.
moments_positive: Javier's thoughtful addition of books on wedding traditions
moments_negative: The slow speed at which the waiter served our complimentary drinks

expenses.item: champagne and other drinks included in evening reception offer
buffet-style dinner for two from the restaurant's private dining menu
